content:
Got it! 

I noticed you didn’t provide a full name, which is required. Please share your full legal name so we can proceed with your bank account opening.

Great! I've noted your details: full name, age, email, ward, and account type.

However, I see your age is currently set to 10, which doesn't meet the minimum requirement for opening a bank account in India. You must be at least 18 years old. 

Could you please provide your phone number?
